text: The fix replaces min(0, sum(naked_pnls)) with sum(min(0, per_pair_naked_pnl)).

locator.quote: Best fitness frozen for three generations

text: The pre-fix GA showed best_fitness frozen at 0.338 for three generations with mean degrading.
Pre-fix the asymmetric term made placing many nakeds a positive-EV strategy because of lucky-naked cancellation.
